# DSLRaid Roadmap Index

<!-- generated by scripts/roadmapgen.sh; do not edit by hand -->

Source: docs/roadmap.md

| Milestone | Goal | Scope Items | Exit Criteria |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: |
| Milestone 0: Bootstrap | make the project understandable and contributable. | 7 | 3 |
| Milestone 1: IR Kernel | make the executable IR real. | 10 | 4 |
| Milestone 1.5: Operational Contracts | make DSLRaid usable in CI before the viewer exists. | 7 | 1 |
| Milestone 2: FSM Analyzer | prove DSLRaid is more than a renderer. | 14 | 1 |
| Milestone 3: Projected View Model | project typed IR into a screen-ready model without turning the graph into core IR. | 6 | 1 |
| Milestone 4: Canvas Rendering MVP | render the projected view model before building a polished app shell. | 7 | 1 |
| Milestone 5: Inspector MVP | make clicking objects valuable. | 8 | 1 |
| Milestone 6: Lisp Authoring | support executable SSOT authoring. | 12 | 1 |
| Milestone 7: Composition and Union | make multi-FSM architecture exploration unique. | 6 | 1 |
| Milestone 8: Diagnostics Overlay | make diagnostics visible in projections and the viewer. | 5 | 1 |
| Milestone 9: Runtime Trace and Coverage | compare designed behavior to observed behavior. | 10 | 1 |
| Milestone 10: Diff and PR Review | make DSLRaid useful in code review. | 8 | 1 |
| Milestone 11: Export and Generated Docs | make DSLRaid output useful outside the app. | 7 | 1 |
| Milestone 12: Codegen | prove that the same IR can generate implementation artifacts. | 5 | 1 |
| Milestone 13: Scale and Incrementality | make large systems practical. | 8 | 1 |
| Milestone 14: Language Server | make DSLRaid usable inside editors. | 6 | 1 |
